title: ASR Outdoor (2-Pack) Camping Utensil Set Army Military MRE Chow Set
description:
Get ready for your next meal on the go with the ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Multi Function Outdoor Camping Utensil Set! This set includes a knife, fork, and a spoon that clip together for convenience. Perfect for any camping, backpacking, or other travel situations. Not only great for the outdoors, keep a set in your car, at the office, an emergency kit, or even in your pocket so you're ready to dine anytime!

ASR Outdoor (2-Pack) Camping Utensil Set Army Military MRE Chow Set

Get ready for your next meal on the go with the ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Multi Function Outdoor Camping Utensil Set!

Key Features

  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMPACT: This knife, fork, and spoon set clips together for easy storage making it ideal for travel, camping, and hiking
  • BONUS CAN OPENER FUNCTION: The knife utensil conveniently includes a can opener tool for added versatility that comes in handy in a pinch
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made from stainless steel, just like you these camp utensils can hold their own in the great outdoors
  • INCLUDES CARRYING POUCH: Comes in a transparent pouch with a snap closure
  • 2 PACK: Never dine alone; this two pack of camp kitchen utensils makes sure you're always prepared for company even if you're eating an MRE on the side of a mountain

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 3I1-CUS2P
  • UPC: 855569004781
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: One Size

This set includes a knife, fork, and a spoon that clip together for convenience. Perfect for any camping, backpacking, or other travel situations.

Not only great for the outdoors, keep a set in your car, at the office, an emergency kit, or even in your pocket so you're ready to dine anytime!
